title: bionpu measurements.json
description: Schema for results/<track>/<run-id>/measurements.json. Implements PRD §4.2 (umbrella) and the units locked in bionpu/bench/UNITS.md. Custom annotation x-deterministic marks fields that legitimately differ run-to-run (timestamp, run_id) so consumers can diff records modulo non-determinism.

schema_version.description: SemVer of this schema. Bump when records' shape changes.

run_id.description: ISO-8601 timestamp + 4-char hex suffix; unique per bench_all invocation.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp recorded at bench_all entry. Differs run-to-run by definition.

track.description: Track name. _smoke is reserved for the default `bionpu bench --all` workload.

MeasurementRecord.description: One timed run's measurements per UNITS.md.

device.description: Device the work ran on. UNITS.md §0; POWER_DOMAINS.md per-device caveats.

t_start.description: Monotonic seconds at start of timed window. Captured via time.monotonic_ns()/1e9.

t_end.description: Monotonic seconds at end of timed window.

throughput.description: Map of throughput-unit name to value. Keys are a subset of UNITS.md ThroughputUnit.

accuracy.description: Accuracy metrics per UNITS.md §2. Empty in mock workloads; populated by //.

energy_j.description: Joules consumed over the timed window per the device's EnergyReader. Null when reader is unavailable; never zero-as-fake (POWER_DOMAINS.md §4 rule #3).

energy_source.description: How the joules figure was obtained. 'stub' marks / preliminary-only readings; (CPU/GPU) and (NPU) replace with real-* values.

latencies_ms.description: Nearest-rank percentiles + max from per-chunk samples (UNITS.md §4.1).

vram_peak_bytes.description: Torch CUDA peak per UNITS.md §5.2; null when CUDA absent.

tile_memory_bytes.description: AIE2P tile-local memory bytes per UNITS.md §5.3. Null on CPU/GPU. Null != 0.

env.description: Stable env snapshot (no host-specific values; see harness._capture_env).

n_iters.description: Iterations driven through this (op, device) pair.

reason_unavailable.description: If energy_j or another field is null because a reader is unavailable, the human-readable reason. Null means 'all readers were available'.
